COMMENT: 
Some employers offer prescription drug plans to their retirees, and Part D pays a subsidy to plans that 
offer coverage that is equivalent to (or better than) conventional Part D benefits. 
CMS does not collect PDEs for beneficiaries that are enrolled in RDS-eligible plans. 
There are 12 monthly variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name 
correspond with the month (e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December). 

^
